ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.SETTINGS.VISIBLE_TO_PL: If disabled, the panel is only visible to the GM and assistant GMs.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.SETTINGS.DISABLED_LOCA: This setting applies only to you and doesn't affect other users.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.SETTINGS.RESET_PANEL_P: When enabled, the position of the panel is reset to the standard position (top left) on each restart (or F5). If disabled, the panel can be moved with the right mouse button and the new position will be saved.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.SETTINGS.ICON_VERTICAL: Shows the small placeholder icon, which is displayed when the panel is minimized, vertically instead of horizontally.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.SETTINGS.WOUND_MESSAGE: If enabled, changes in wounds are displayed in the chat. This setting is only available to the GM and assistant GMs.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.SETTINGS.FATIGUE_MESSA: If enabled, changes in fatigue are displayed in the chat. This setting is only available to the GM and assistant GMs.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.SETTINGS.BENNY_MESSAGE: The chat output for bennies is system-enforced and cannot currently be disabled.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.SETTINGS.SIMPLE_CHAT_H: If enabled, only brief information about changes to wounds, fatigue, and bennies is shown in chat, without the detailed explanatory text.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.DIALOG.RELOAD_CONTENT: This setting will only take effect after a reload. Would you like to reload the application now?
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.NO_BENNY_SUPPORT: The actor type of {actorName} does not support bennies.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.NO_FATIGUE_SUPPOR: The actor type of {actorName} does not support fatigue.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.NO_WOUND_SUPPORT: The actor type of {actorName} does not support wounds.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.NO_BENNIES_LEFT: Not possible! {actorName} has no more bennies to spend.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.NO_WOUNDS_LEFT: Not possible! {actorName} is already fully healed and cannot lose any more wounds.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.ALREADY_HEALED: Not possible! {actorName} is already fully healed.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.NO_FATIGUE_LEFT: Not possible! {actorName} is already fully recovered and cannot lose any more fatigue levels.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.ALREADY_RECOVERED: Not possible! {actorName} is already fully recovered.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.INCAPACITATED_WOU:
{actorName} is now INCAPACITATED from suffering further injuries!
(cannot perform any actions)
{actorName} is now INCAPACITATED from suffering further injuries!
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.INCAPACITATED_FAT:
{actorName} is now INCAPACITATED from ongoing fatigue!
(helpless for 2d6 hours, possibly unconscious)
{actorName} is now INCAPACITATED from ongoing fatigue!

(−1 to Pace and all Trait rolls)

ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.FATIGUE_LEVEL_1:
{actorName} gains one level of fatigue and is now FATIGUED.
(−1 to all Trait rolls)
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.FATIGUE_LEVEL_2:

ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.FATIGUE_DOWN_TO_1:
{actorName} loses one level of fatigue and is now only FATIGUED.
(−1 to all Trait rolls)
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.ALL_FATIGUE_GONE: {actorName} has lost all fatigue levels and is fully recovered.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.NO_WOUNDS_LEFT_VE: Not possible! {actorName} is already fully repaired and cannot lose any more wounds.
ARGAS_BENNY_WOUND.CHAT.ALREADY_HEALED_VE: Not possible! {actorName} is already fully repaired.
